description: Send notifications to your own Amazon SES destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise ses:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters.
name: msg-to-ses_email

request.template: {"urls":"ses://${ customer_secrets.SES_EMAIL_FROM_EMAIL }/${ customer_secrets.SES_EMAIL_ACCESS_KEY_ID }/${ customer_secrets.SES_EMAIL_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY }/${ customer_secrets.SES_EMAIL_REGION }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"ses://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.from_email_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.access_key_id_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.secret_access_key_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.region_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}
